items.title: Buyer Discovery Relevance Initiative
items.description: Improve cross-category local discovery by strengthening search relevance, saved alerts, and buyer trust signals across the buyer web and mobile experiences.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase successful buyer transaction rate through more relevant discovery and faster trust-building.
Reduce time to relevant shortlist through better search and alerts.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase qualified buyer activity that converts into marketplace liquidity.

productBricks.change: Improve category-aware ranking, filtering, and local-intent relevance.
Improve alert precision and recency handling across saved searches.
Strengthen trust surfaces and listing quality presentation on detail pages.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out relevance and trust improvements on web.
Bring alert and detail-page improvements to iOS.
Bring alert and detail-page improvements to Android.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Buyer discovery and trust signals discovery

items.title: Casual Seller Listing Quality Initiative
items.description: Improve publish completion, pricing confidence, and early sale-through by evolving the self-serve listing funnel for casual sellers.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase listing-to-sale realization through stronger listing quality and pricing guidance.
Increase publish completion and price-fit confidence.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase active supply and boost-ready listings.

productBricks.change: Add category-aware listing templates and better draft recovery.
Improve pricing guidance with category comparables and trust explanations.
Simplify relist, reserve, and sold-state handling.

deliveryChannels.change: Launch the revised self-serve listing funnel on web.
Launch photo-first listing updates on iOS.
Launch photo-first listing updates on Android.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Casual seller publish funnel and pricing guidance discovery

items.title: Professional Seller ROI Initiative
items.description: Improve merchant retention by strengthening feed reliability, lead workflow visibility, and paid exposure reporting in the merchant workspace.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase qualified demand yield through better lead handling and storefront visibility.
Increase visibility ROI confidence and lead conversion proxies.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve retention and expansion of professional seller revenue.

productBricks.change: Improve ingestion diagnostics and feed reliability.
Expose clearer listing and paid exposure performance reporting.
Improve lead routing and SLA visibility for merchant teams.

deliveryChannels.change: Ship merchant workflow and analytics improvements in the portal.
Ship ingestion validation and diagnostics improvements to partner APIs.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Merchant ROI and feed reliability discovery

items.title: Trust, Safety, and Protected Transactions Initiative
items.description: Strengthen identity, fraud controls, and optional protected transaction flows in higher-risk categories.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase safe transaction completion for higher-risk buyer journeys.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase high-value category conversion with lower fraud exposure.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce spam contacts and failed handoffs for casual sellers.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Protect supply quality and support monetizable protected transaction flows.

productBricks.change: Expand identity verification for risky categories and sellers.
Improve scam and fraud detection across listing and messaging flows.
Add category-specific protected payment and dispute patterns.

deliveryChannels.change: Expose protected transaction messaging on buyer surfaces.
Add seller protection guidance and verification flows.
Add merchant trust configuration and exception handling.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Protected transactions and fraud controls discovery
